1.$description: Instant tap feedback, tiny opacity flickers

2.$description: Hover fills, small opacity fades, colour transitions — the most common micro-interaction timing

3.$description: Micro-interactions needing slightly more presence; small reveals, focus rings

4.$description: Chevron / disclosure rotation, dropdown & popover content, in-component state

5.$description: Panel state changes: accordions, expand/collapse, item enter/exit

6.$description: Large physical-scale moves (e.g. SideNav width expand/collapse)

7.$description: Cross-component transitions: page content sliding, large layout shifts

8.$description: Slowest transition step: very large layout shifts, deliberate full-screen moves

loop.$description: Standard continuous-loop period (standalone Spinner, skeleton shimmer)

loop-fast.$description: Tighter loop for embedded/inline contexts (in-button spinner — faster reads as more responsive feedback)

standard.$description: Most transitions — enters AND exits. Smooth, no overshoot. Default for colour, fill, opacity, focus rings.

spring.$description: Signature Pathway curve. Interactive element entrances: dropdown/popover panel opens. A whisper of overshoot (y2=1.04) — easeful, only *ever so slightly* alive. Softened 2026-06-08 from 1.08, which read as too bouncy. Not for chevrons — see chevron rule below.

decelerate.$description: Enters where the element should glide in smoothly — overlay panels, popovers, anything appearing from outside. Pure ease-out, no bounce.

accelerate.$description: Exits where the element leaves cleanly — dismissing overlays, scaling down.

emphasized.$description: Large physical-scale transitions: full-panel width changes, SideNav width. Smooth glide, no overshoot.

accordion.$description: Accordion settle — content reveal/hide, chevron rotation. The gentlest overshoot in the system (y2=1.03). Softened 2026-06-08 from 0.22,1.12,0.36,1, which was visibly bouncy.

linear.$description: Continuous loops only (spinners, shimmer). Never for bounded transitions.
